blocks.content: Wren came back an hour later.

She came in through the front door and went straight to the kitchen and got a glass of water and stood at the counter with it. Her face was the same as always — quiet, composed. But her eyes were tired in a specific way that wasn't physical.

blocks.speaker: Cade
blocks.content: Did you tell him what you told me.

blocks.speaker: Wren
blocks.content: I told him what I remembered. Which wasn't enough to say anything specific.
Nadia was at the table. Reading her book. She didn't look up during this conversation.

blocks.speaker: Cade
blocks.content: Good. That was the right thing.
She drank her water. Set the glass down.

blocks.speaker: Wren
blocks.content: I just want whoever did this to be found. That's all I want.
She looked at the table when she said it.
